initialOpenPositionInvestType.description: Specifies how the initial investment amount is calculated.

initialOpenPositionInvestAmount.description: Defines the numeric value used when the investment type requires a fixed or percent-based amount.

recurring.description: Enable/disable recurring trades for this position.

recurringPeriod.description: Minimum number of bars/periods between additional investments.

recurringInvestAmount.description: Amount to invest each recurring trade, interpreted according to recurringInvestType.

maxRecurringCount.description: Maximum number of recurring investments per position (0 = unlimited).

stopLossPercent.description: Optional stop-loss percentage below the execution price.

takeProfitPercent.description: Optional take-profit percentage above the execution price.
